claim_text: A repeated posture-linked signal may be organized as an association claim until a mechanism is independently supported.
boundary_notes: Synthetic fixture only; does not describe a real person or recommend treatment.
contradiction_notes: Mechanistic support is absent, so promotion requires external evidence.
falsification_route: Downgrade if repeated observations show no temporal relation between posture state and signal frequency.
next_action: Route to longitudinal delta detector and require provenance before promotion.

claim_text: Animal-care literature notes should separate observation, diagnosis boundary, and intervention before entering collaboration memory.
boundary_notes: Research organization only; not veterinary advice.
falsification_route: Downgrade generality if species-specific evidence contradicts multi-species framing.
next_action: Route to animal evidence router before collaborator export.

claim_text: A raw private timeline proves the cause.
This cures the condition and should be used immediately.
